question:
Fill in the blank with the missing number:

Trevor is currently 11 years old and his older brother is _______ years old. How old will Trevor be when his older brother is three times as old as Trevor is now?
response: Trevor is currently 11 years old and his older brother is 22 years old. If Trevor's brother is three times as old as Trevor is now, that would be 33 years old. So, Trevor will be 22 when his brother is 33.
